summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated artifact reports no cluster-level security-sensitive items and no shared canonical; closure, merge, fix, and low-signal closeout are not available for this shard. Hydrated open PRs are kept open as independent review items unless the item is security-sensitive or missing live artifact state.
